tool_args.label: October 2022 Crime Report
tool_args.raw_text: October 2022 Crime Report - NYPD Transit Bureau monthly report on major felonies in NYCT Subway system

payload.title: October 2022 Crime Report
payload.description: Monthly crime statistics report for NYCT Subway system submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau

evidence_refs.source_quote: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies including: homicide, robbery, assault, rape in addition to hate crime incidents occurring in the NYCT Subway system. The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month ending prior to the reporting period.

source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
